have h : ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ) ∂volume, Irrational x := by

                norm_cast at ha ⊢ <;>
                nlinarith

              <;>

              <;>

        exact h₇ h₅
      exact h₄
    -- Use the fact that the measure of (0,1) is positive
    have h₂ : 0 < volume (Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) := by
      norm_num [Real.volume_Ioo]
    -- Use the fact that the measure of the irrationals is full
    have h₃ : ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ) ∂volume, x ∈ {x : ℝ | Irrational x} := by
      have h₄ : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 ⊆ {x : ℝ | Irrational x} := h₁
      have h₅ : 0 < volume (Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) := h₂
      have h₆ : ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ) ∂volume, x ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 ∨ x ∉ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 := by

          have h₉ : x ∈ {x : ℝ | Irrational x} := h₄ h₈

        | inr hx =>
          by_contra h₁₀
          have h₁₁ : x ∉ {x : ℝ | Irrational x} := h₁₀
          have h₁₂ : ¬Irrational x := by simpa using h₁₁
